title: US managed honeybee colonies: sent to California almonds vs elsewhere

source.name: Colonies trucked to California almond pollination vs. total US managed colonies
source.publisher: USDA Economic Research Service / Apiary Inspectors of America

notes: Derived share: USDA ERS reports roughly 1.6 million colonies are trucked to California almond orchards each February, against the U.S. Beekeeping Survey's estimated ~2.6 million total managed colonies nationwide.
